projectDescription: A VS Code extension that brings Agentic Spec-Driven Development to your workflow, integrating SpecKit, OpenSpec, and GitHub Copilot to visually manage specs, steering documents, agents, and automation hooks.
keyFeatures: Spec-Driven Development with SpecKit and OpenSpec support
GitHub Copilot Chat integration for AI-assisted spec and code generation
Visual Spec Explorer with lifecycle management (draft → review → archived)
Steering management: Constitution, project rules, and user instruction rules
Agent discovery and custom Copilot Chat agent creation
MCP Hooks automation: trigger actions on agent/spec events
Cloud agent dispatch via Devin and Gemini CLI (ACP)
Prompt and skill management in the Actions explorer
Hot-reload of agent resources without extension restart
Welcome screen with dependency detection and one-click setup
publicApiSurface: gatomia.spec.create — Create New Spec
gatomia.spec.runTask — Run a single task via Copilot Chat
gatomia.spec.runFullSpec — Run all tasks in a spec
gatomia.spec.sendToReview — Transition spec to review state
gatomia.spec.sendToArchived — Archive a spec
gatomia.steering.createProjectRule — Create a project-scoped instruction rule
gatomia.steering.createUserRule — Create a personal instruction rule
gatomia.steering.createConstitution — Generate a Constitution document
gatomia.hooks.addHook — Create a new automation hook
gatomia.hooks.viewLogs — View hook execution logs
gatomia.actions.run — Execute a prompt or action
gatomia.actions.createAgentFile — Create a new agent definition
gatomia.actions.createSkill — Create a new skill resource
gatomia.dispatchTask — Run a task on a cloud agent (Devin/Gemini)
gatomia.dispatchFullSpec — Dispatch a full spec to cloud agent
gatomia.migration.start — Migrate OpenSpec project to SpecKit
gatomia.showWelcome — Open the Welcome Screen
gatomia.acp.switchProvider — Switch active chat/agent provider
Agent resource format: resources/agents/<name>.agent.md
Hook template variables: $agentOutput, $clipboardContent, $outputPath, $specId, $specTitle, $timestamp, $branch
